items.reviewerNotes: Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Intersection MCQ; master correct "reduce speed and go through slowly" maps to Spanish D "Reduce speed and stop to observe" (closest semantic). Top-2 candidates unrelated.
Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Parking violation MCQ; master correct "no stopping marking" maps to Spanish D "no-parking sign zone".

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Sign shows X/cross intersection (master img tags +,intersection). Master correct A="intersection" → Spanish C "X-junction". q0764 on requires-review list but tag agreement strong.
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Sign image X008 white/black rectangular = county/district road. Master correct C→Spanish C. Tag agreement perfect (x008,008).
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangle down-arrow = steep downhill. Master D="steep downhill road" → Spanish C "steep downward slope".
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Double yellow solid lines = prohibitive marking. Master C → Spanish D "Prohibition line".

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Override: blue rectangular with red top bar and white vertical = dead-end sign (q0822 image tags: T/hammer, blue/white/red). Master q0822 D="dead-end road" → Spanish A "Vía sin salida". Matcher top-1 q0786 was wrong (text-only confusion).

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Override: Spanish prompt is about forged/altered LICENSE PLATE (not driver license). Master q0449 "uses falsified license plate" correct C=12-point → Spanish D=12 points. Matcher q0981 (driver license) was a topic confusion. q0981 in requires-review list.

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: POV at highway exit/deceleration ramp. Master q0391 "lights when entering speed-reducing lane" correct D="right-turn signal" → Spanish B "right turn signal". Matcher q0974 (weather/snow) was wrong.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: MCQ + image tag agreement — yellow car front-view on road with double yellow line and no visible plate matches q0476 (tags yellow-car, mountain, trees). Spanish option-set is a direct translation of master q0476 options; master correct o2="deliberately cover the license plate" → Spanish C. Confusion pair q0476→q0493 ruled out: q0493 is about a stopped car at bus station, not driving.

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Override: Spanish about hiding/damaging license plate. Master q0371 "deliberately covered/stained license plate" correct D=12-point → Spanish A=12 points. Matcher q0981 was wrong topic.
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Tunnel two-way MCQ exact match; master D "sidelights/low-beam" → Spanish D "clearance/low-beam".
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Sign: blue circle with diagonal down-right arrow = "drive by right side". Master B → Spanish D "Conducción por el lado derecho".
Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Green front-fog-light icon (lines pointing out). Master q0580 D="front fog light on" → Spanish A. q0580 in requires-review list.
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circle bicycle sign = bicycle/non-motorized lane. Master D → Spanish D.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Image-dependent sign — yellow triangle with two opposite vertical arrows = two-way-traffic warning; tag agreement with q0656 (triangle, two-arrows, opposite-arrows, yellow/black). q0928 (downhill) and q0927 (uphill) ruled out by arrow direction. Master q0656 correct o4="two-way traffic" → Spanish A="Vía de dos sentidos".
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: MCQ exact match: ambulance opposite direction → move to side, reduce, yield. Master A → Spanish A.
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Main-road priority sign (thick up-arrow + side branches). Master B="main road goes first" → Spanish C "Priority on main road".

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Override: highway POV with 120 sign + prompt asks MINIMUM speed. Master q0410 "minimum speed in this lane" with image tag 120, correct D="90km/hr" → Spanish B=90. Matcher q0367 asks MAX speed — wrong question.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Dashboard indicator MCQ — red battery icon with +/- terminals matches q0584 tags (battery, -, +, red, gray) exactly. Master q0584 correct o4="charging circuit malfunction" → Spanish D="No funciona el circuito eléctrico de almacenamiento de energía".

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: MCQ exact match — rainy day, pedestrians with umbrellas/raincoats; q0167 option-set is a 1:1 translation of Spanish A=normal speed / B=continuously honk / C=swerve+accelerate / D=honk-in-advance+reduce-speed. Master q0167 correct o3="honk in advance and properly reduce speed" → Spanish D.
Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangle with ! = general warning. Master B="watch for danger" → Spanish C "Danger / general warning".
